title: Deepslate Ore Tops (Faithful)
description: Faithful Addon that ensures deepslate ores blend seamlessly with regular deepslate by applying the correct top texture for each ore block, creating a more polished and consistent look.
body:
"Deepslate Ore Tops" is a Faithful Addon that improves the visual consistency of deepslate ores in Minecraft. By applying the correct top texture to each ore block, this pack ensures that deepslate ores blend seamlessly with regular deepslate. The result is a more polished and clean look.
![64x Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/yNTxNiK8/images/fb2f5eee98ec56c3bb19a704b337a66dba3b4588_350.webp)
